title: Go Bega Bolwetse
subtitle: Bega le go latelela malwetse a diruiwa

report.title: Bega Bolwetse jo bo Belaelwang
report.subtitle: Romela pegelo kwa Lefapheng la Ditirelo tsa Bongaka jwa Diruiwa
report.manualAddress: Tsena aterese ya polasi kgotsa tlhaloso:
report.addressPlaceholder: sekai, 5km ka bokone jwa Francistown, gaufi le noka...
report.locationPlaceholder: Lefelo la polasi kgotsa di-coordinate tsa GPS
report.locationHelp: Lefelo la gago le thusa DVS go araba ka bofefo. Go batla ka GPS go dira sentle kwa ntle.
report.species: Mofuta wa Diruiwa tse di Amegileng
report.suspectedDisease: Bolwetse jo bo Belaelwang (fa bo itsewe)
report.descriptionPlaceholder: Tlhalosa se o se lemogileng: e simolotse leng, gore diruiwa di itshwere jang, diponagalo dife tse di bonweng...
report.photoTips: Tsaya ditshwantsho tse di tlhaloganyesegang tsa mafelo a a amegileng, molomo, dinao, le letlalo. Tsenya selo sa go bontsha tekanyo.
report.markUrgent: Supe fa e Tlhokega ka Bonako
report.urgentNote: Dirisa fa go belaelwa malwetse a a tshwanetseng go begwa kgotsa ditlhabologo
report.fmdMessage: Se ke bolwetse jo bo tshwanetseng go begwa. Bega ka bonako mme o seke wa suthisa diruiwa.
report.offlineSave: Ga o a golagana le inthanete. Pegelo e tla bolokwa mo lefelong mme e romelwe fa o boela mo inthaneteng.

errors.descriptionTooShort: Tswee tswee, tlhalosa ka botlalo (bonye ditlhaka tse 20)
errors.invalidCount: Palogotlhe ya diruiwa e tshwanetse go nna bonnye 1
errors.symptomsRequired: Bonye seponagalo se le sengwe se a tlhokega

confirmation.title: Pegelo e Rometswe ka Atlego
confirmation.subtitle: Pegelo ya gago ya bolwetse e amogetswe
confirmation.offlineTitle: E Bolokilwe kwa Ntle ga Inthanete
confirmation.offlineMessage: Pegelo ya gago e bolokilwe mo lefelong mme e tla romelwa ka nosi fa o boela mo inthaneteng.
confirmation.step1: DVS e itsisiwe ka pegelo ya gago
confirmation.step2: Ofisiri e tla golagana le wena mo diurang tse 24
confirmation.step3: O seke wa suthisa diruiwa go fitlha go laiwa
confirmation.step4: Kgaoganya diruiwa tse di amegileng fa go kgonega

history.title: Hisetori ya Dipegelo
history.subtitle: Bona le go laola dipegelo tsa gago tsa malwetse
history.noReportsMessage: Ga o a romela dipegelo dipe tsa malwetse.
history.noFilteredReports: Ga go na dipegelo tse di tshwanang le setlhophi se se tlhophilweng

status.acknowledgedDesc: DVS e bone pegelo ya gago
status.investigatingDesc: Ofisiri e abetswe ntlha ya gago

response.title: Karabo ya DVS
response.scheduledVisit: Ketelo e e Beakantsweng ya Polasi

zones.title: Mafelo a Taolo ya Malwetse
zones.activeZones: Mafelo a a lebilweng a a dirang

symptomChecker.title: Mmotlobi wa Malwetse
symptomChecker.subtitle: Go lemoga malwetse ka AI
symptomChecker.possibleDiseases: Malwetse a a ka nnang teng
symptomChecker.whenCallVet: Nako ya go Bitsa Ngaka ya Diruiwa
symptomChecker.vetReason1: Fa diponagalo di tswelela go feta diura tse 24
symptomChecker.vetReason2: Fa diruiwa di le dintsi di bontsha diponagalo
symptomChecker.vetReason3: Fa sediruiwa se le mo mathateng a magolo
symptomChecker.vetReason4: Fa go belaelwa malwetse a a tshwanetseng go begwa
symptomChecker.fmdWarning: Go belaelwa Bolwetse jwa FMD - Go tlhokega tsia ya ka bonako!
symptomChecker.fmdStep1: Kgaoganya diruiwa tse di amegileng ka bonako
symptomChecker.fmdStep3: Phepafatsa didiriswa le meeso ka diaparo tsa go itlhatswa
symptomChecker.photoNote: Ditshwantsho di sekasekiwa mo sedirisweng sa gago mme ga di romelwe kwa marung. Se se dira kwa ntle ga inthanete mme se sireletsa sephiri sa gago.

areas.mouthDesc: Go elela mathe, dithaga, bothata jwa go ja
areas.feetDesc: Go tlotsa, go ruruga, dithaga mo ditlhakong
areas.skinDesc: Dintho, diaku, go wa ga moriri
areas.breathingDesc: Go kgohlela, go elela metsi mo nkong, bothata jwa go hema
areas.stomachDesc: Go ruruwa ga mpa, letshololo, go tlhoka go ja
areas.eyesDesc: Go elela, go le gouru, go ruruga
